tool.name: Mac Launch App
tool.description: Launch an application on the Mac.

arguments.description: Command line arguments to pass to the app

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_app_launch
Launch an application on the Mac.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_app_launch", "query": "{\"appName\": \"Safari\"}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- appName: App name or bundle ID (required)
- arguments: Optional command line args

**Returns:** success, pid, bundleIdentifier, errorMessage
whenToUse: User asks to open an app
Need to launch a specific application
whenNotToUse: User didn't explicitly ask to open an app
